name: Western Copper and Gold Corporation
description: Western Copper and Gold Corporation is advancing the Casino Copper-Gold Project, one of the largest undeveloped copper-gold resources in North America, located approximately 300 km northwest of Whitehorse, Yukon. The company completed a feasibility study in 2022 and is currently in the YESAB environmental panel review process, targeting shovel-ready status in 2026-2027. Strategic investors Rio Tinto and Mitsubishi Materials have backed the project, which is projected to produce an average of 353 Mlbs CuEq annually over a 27-year mine life.
